PLAINTIFFS RICKEY DANIEL AND FILISA SEMENOFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to file and serve Second Amended Complaint no later than August 24, 2021.
